text.title: lessons-learned Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lessons-learned as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Lessons held only at project close-out.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Small, frequent lessons are forgotten over a multi-month project; by close-out only major events are recalled, and even those lose context details.

failure-mode.description: Lessons stored in a wiki without a tag taxonomy or search capability.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An unsearchable repository means lessons cannot be retrieved at kickoff; they effectively do not exist for the next project team.

failure-mode.description: Recommendations written as "consider Y" or "be more careful".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Vague recommendations cannot be actioned, measured, or assigned. Every recommendation requires an action verb, an owner role, and a point of application.
